title: The Interactive Debate
description: Choose the best expression for each debate situation.

questions.question: You want to express a strong opinion: "___ homework should be abolished."
Someone said something you disagree with. The most polite response is:
"_____, technology has many benefits. _____, it also has drawbacks." (contrast)
questions.explanation: "On one hand... However..." sets up a balanced contrast.

questions.question: Which phrase adds a supporting argument?
questions.explanation: "Furthermore" adds a supporting argument to your point.

questions.question: You agree enthusiastically with a classmate. You say:
"___ ___ ___, I think social media does more harm than good." (polite opinion)
questions.explanation: "In my opinion" is a clear, polite way to state your view.

questions.question: In the OREO structure, what comes after "Opinion"?
questions.explanation: OREO: Opinion → Reason → Example → Opinion restated.

questions.question: Which is the best way to acknowledge the other side before disagreeing?
options: I don't care what you think.
questions.explanation: "I see your point, but..." acknowledges + politely disagrees.

questions.question: "___ , wearing school uniforms saves families money." Which connector concludes an argument?
questions.explanation: "In conclusion" signals you're wrapping up your argument.

questions.question: "That's a very ___ ___. I hadn't thought of it that way." (acknowledging a good argument)
questions.explanation: "That's a good point" acknowledges someone's argument respectfully.

questions.question: Which connector introduces a reason?
questions.explanation: "Due to" introduces a cause/reason for something.

questions.question: "_____ I respect your opinion, I have a different view." Which word fits?
questions.explanation: "Although I respect your opinion" = polite concession before disagreeing.

title: Argumentos OREO
description: Build well-structured arguments using the OREO technique.

sentences.correct: I strongly believe that exercise is important
This is because it improves both physical and mental health
For example regular exercise reduces stress levels
I see your point but I disagree
However technology also has some disadvantages
In conclusion the benefits outweigh the risks
From my perspective education is essential
Although I respect your opinion I have a different view

title: Expression → Function
description: Match each debate expression with its communicative function.

title: Debate Arsenal
description: Master all the expressions you need to debate with confidence.

cards.example: In my opinion, learning languages opens doors to new cultures.
I believe that education should be free for everyone.
From my perspective, teamwork is essential for success.
I'm convinced that practice makes perfect.
As I see it, we need to focus on renewable energy.
"School should start later." — "I couldn't agree more!"
"Recycling saves resources." — "That's a good point."
"Exercise is important for mental health." — "You're absolutely right."
"Cars should be banned." — "I'm afraid I disagree. People need them."
I see your point, but I think there are other solutions.
With all due respect, I think that argument doesn't hold up.
Travel is exciting. However, it can also be stressful.
Furthermore, studies show that reading improves empathy.
Cars are convenient. On the other hand, they pollute.
In conclusion, the evidence strongly supports my position.
The plan has risks. Nevertheless, I think we should try it.
Moreover, this approach has been proven effective in other countries.
Although some disagree, I believe this is the right choice.

cards.back:
O = Opinion
R = Reason
E = Example
O = Opinion restated
cards.example: "I think pets teach responsibility (O) because caring for an animal requires daily effort (R). For instance, feeding a dog every day... (E) That's why I believe pets are great for kids (O)."
To sum up, the advantages clearly outweigh the disadvantages.

description: Listen and choose the correct answer.

This is because it improves both physical and mental health
For example regular exercise reduces stress levels
I see your point but I disagree
